PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?player ?name(SUM(?derbies) AS ?totalDerbies) WHERE {
  VALUES ?derbyTeam {
    wd:Q9617 wd:Q672 wd:Q41152 wd:Q9751 wd:Q131 wd:Q244 wd:Q40875 wd:Q49313 wd:Q3999 wd:Q981
  }
  ?player p:P54 / ps:P54 ?derbyTeam .
  ?player p:P54 ?membership .
  ?membership pq:P580 ?start .
  ?membership pq:P582 ?end .
  FILTER(?start < ?end)
  .
  ?player rdfs:label ?name .
  FILTER(LANG(?name) = 'en')
  .
  BIND(IF(BOUND(?end) , YEAR(?end) , 2023) - YEAR(?start) AS ?years)
  .
  BIND(?years * 2 AS ?derbies)
}
GROUP BY ?player ?name
HAVING(?totalDerbies > 0)
ORDER BY DESC(?totalDerbies)
LIMIT 1
